refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components to reduce single points of failure
selected_dp.selected_dp: Real-time fault monitoring and diagnostics combined with automated fault recovery procedures

potential_sources: Interaction between fault monitoring and recovery logic
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups monitoring and recovery to reduce coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable telemetry data from vehicle and network
Risk of delayed fault detection impacting availability
High safety criticality requires robust fault handling
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy DP if single points of failure are identified in detailed design.

im_boundary.name: Safety Services
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for monitoring system health, detecting faults, and initiating recovery actions to maintain availability and safety.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle and system status data for fault detection.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts on detected faults and recovery status to operators and safety managers.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for fault data exchange and recovery commands.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused on fault monitoring; higher diffusion risk.
Physical hardware focused; fault monitoring logic less contained here.
Primarily for remote control; not suitable for fault monitoring and recovery.
Best containment for fault monitoring and recovery; aligns with safety criticality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning fault monitoring and recovery DP to Safety Services module centralizes availability management and reduces diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Safety Services module with multiple responsibilities
Interface latency on Telemetry and Network Link could impact fault detection timeliness
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor Safety Services module complexity and consider splitting fault detection and recovery if diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing fault detection and recovery to meet availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential complexity concentration in Safety Services module
Dependency on external interfaces may introduce latency
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Safety Services module provides strong containment for availability-related functions, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified through system uptime metrics and fault recovery logs collected via Safety Services.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability-related functions to Safety Services module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Evaluate Safety Services module workload in subsequent design iterations.
Validate interface performance to ensure timely fault detection.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting containment and coupling criteria. Verification and allocation are feasible with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently detailed and consistent; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry and network interfaces provide reliable and timely data.
Safety Services module can handle additional fault monitoring responsibilities.
open_risks: Interface latency impacting fault detection timeliness.
Potential complexity overload in Safety Services module.
evidence_needed: Performance metrics of Safety Services under fault monitoring load.
Latency measurements on Telemetry and Network Link interfaces.
